business_question: Which suppliers have the lowest on-time delivery performance?
business_context: Procurement teams need to identify suppliers causing supply chain delays.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    sp.SUPPLIER_NAME,
    COUNT(sd.DELIVERY_KEY) AS TOTAL_DELIVERIES,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sd.IS_ON_TIME = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ON_TIME_DELIVERIES,
    ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN sd.IS_ON_TIME = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 /
        COUNT(sd.DELIVERY_KEY),
        2
    ) AS ON_TIME_RATE_PCT
FROM FACT_SUPPLIER_DELIVERY sd
JOIN DIM_SUPPLIER sp
    ON sd.SUPPLIER_KEY = sp.SUPPLIER_KEY
GROUP BY sp.SUPPLIER_NAME
ORDER BY ON_TIME_RATE_PCT ASC;
